name: Chants of Sennaar
description: Winner of Best Indie Game at the 2024 New York Game Awards and nominated multiple times at ceremonies including The Game Awards and the BAFTA, Chants of Sennaar is a critically-acclaimed puzzle and adventure game from Rundisc. Inspired by the myth of Babel, you play as the Traveler exploring a vast tower inhabited by five distinct Peoples who can no longer understand each other. Observe, listen, and decipher ancient languages, noting each glyph in your trusty notebook as you piece together the meaning of every word and restore the bonds between People.
